meta.label: Decision
meta.value: Participate up to the full allocation, subject to final review

sections.title: Overview
paragraphs: ExampleCo is raising a primary SAFE. The case for participating is straightforward: company materials show strong growth, high-quality customer demand, and early profitability.
This is no longer early-entry pricing. The price can work if current run-rate quality, customer breadth, and margin durability hold.

bullets.label: Demand from the right buyers
bullets.text: Company materials list the buyer categories that matter most in this market.

bullets.label: Exceptional reported velocity
bullets.text: Company materials show growth from [A] to [B], alongside reported profitability.

bullets.label: Price discipline
bullets.text: The round is not cheap. The case for participating is that scale, customer quality, and profitability may already support the cap.

sections.title: Comparable Companies and Transactions
paragraphs: These comps are directionally useful, but not clean. Reported revenue may be gross billings, run-rate, or recognized revenue.

rows: What this comp does and does not prove.
